summary: Excellent soundboard recording with tight Jerry leads and standout performances of Shakedown Street, C.C. Rider, and It Takes a Lot to Laugh.
review: The show is praised for its consistently high‑energy performance, especially Jerry Garcia’s soaring solos and the tight ensemble work that shines on tracks like Shakedown Street, C.C. Rider and the Dylan‑era jam "It Takes a Lot to Laugh". The soundboard source delivers strong fidelity, though a few listeners note slightly over‑cooked levels and one critic who wasn’t thrilled with the overall mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews overwhelmingly highlight an outstanding performance (70%+ positive) with only minor recording complaints, yielding a high combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally strong fidelity and clear mix; some listeners note the levels are a bit over‑cooked or not to their taste, but overall the recording is listenable and well balanced.

standout_songs: It Takes a Lot to Laugh
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly with tight ensemble playing throughout; the band maintains high energy from start to finish, delivering memorable jams and solid transitions.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Leads described as "flying out of the guitar", tight and dramatic; praised for tone and vocals.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned as part of the ensemble but no specific performance comment.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for adding a bloozy feel to C.C. Rider, contributing strongly to the vibe.
band_member_comments.Keys: Newly acquired Vince on keyboards and Bruce on baby‑grand piano are highlighted positively.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey and Bill are noted as solid backing; no detailed critique.
